-b4c9-44a1-8b77-ca26d5438113\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-01T14:28:26.640Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_0a25fc43-ba99-4fdd-b2dc-148a1fdcb92\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_0a25fc43-ba99-4fdd-b2dc-148a1fdcb92\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\CodePrj\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MLsllm\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\项目文档.md\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\CodePrj\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MLsllm\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\项目文档.md\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\CodePrj\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MLsllm\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\项目文档.md\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# 智能作文学习支持系统（Streamlit + 大模型 API + PaddleOCR）实现方案（UI细化版）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n&gt; 适用：三栏式 Streamlit 应用  \\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n&gt; OCR：统一采用 PaddleOCR  \\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n&gt; LLM：统一按现有 &#96;llm.py&#96; 封装调用（stream + 强制 JSON）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n## 0. 产品定位与闭环\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n### 0.1 定位\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n本系统是“高中生议论文评改的学习支持系统”，目标是让学生在写作后**发现问题 → 明确证据 → 获得可执行处方 → 完成微任务训练 → 再评估**，形成可重复的自我提升循环。\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n### 0.2 闭环流程（一次作文的标准路径）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n1. 左栏输入：题目 / 字数要求 / 作文（文本或图片 OCR）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n2. 中栏对话：AI 追问澄清（中心论点一句话、材料要点、希望保留的亮点）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n3. 右栏按钮：自评自查 / 作文点评 / 修改处方 / 微任务（生成结构化结果）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n4. 中栏承载展示：所有按钮输出与对话都在中栏“历史对话展示区”沉淀\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n5. 学生按处方改写 / 完成微任务 → 重新触发点评/处方，形成迭代\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n## 1. UI 设计与交互规范（与界面描述对齐）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n### 1.1 整体布局与风格\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- **三栏式垂直布局**：左输入、中对话、右功能\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 简洁浅色基调，突出层级：输入区/对话区/操作区\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 所有“模型输出”统一进入中栏对话流，保证学习过程可追溯\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n## 2. 左侧栏：作文输入区（Input Panel）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n### 2.1 输入项（垂直排列：标签 + 输入框）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n1. **作文题目**（单行文本）：&#96;title&#96;\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n2. **字数要求**（单行文本）：&#96;word_requirement&#96;（例如“不少于800字”）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n3. **作文上传**（双模式）：\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n   - 图片上传：JPG/PNG/JPEG（作文扫描件/照片）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n   - 文本输入：直接粘贴/手动输入正文\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n### 2.2 OCR 交互（仅当上传图片时）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 按钮：&#96;OCR 识别&#96;\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 输出：将识别结果写入“作文正文（可编辑）”文本区\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 同步展示：\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  - OCR 置信度提示（例如：低置信度行列表）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  - 提醒用户手动校对（不强制）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n### 2.3 分段编号（建议必做）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 按钮：&#96;分段编号&#96;\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 功能：将正文按自然段切分，生成 &#96;P1/P2/...&#96; 段落编号\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 目的：为“证据引用（quote + para_id）”提供稳定锚点，提升点评可信度\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n## 3. 中间栏：智能交互对话区（Chat Panel）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n### 3.1 顶部标题\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 固定显示：**“高中生议论文评改”**（作为产品定位提示）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n### 3.2 历史对话展示区\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 按时间顺序展示多轮对话\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 对话内容来源包含两类：\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  1) 学生输入（追问、补充说明）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  2) 智能体输出（包括右侧按钮触发的输出：自评报告/点评/处方/微任务）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n&gt; 规则：右侧按钮触发的结果，不单独占右栏显示；右栏只负责“触发”，结果统一进入中栏对话流。\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n### 3.3 底部输入框（单行）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- placeholder：“与AI的对话/AI的输出”\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 提交后触发 &#96;chat_clarify&#96; action：\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  - AI 以“确认/选择题”为主追问\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  - 生成/更新 &#96;chat_summary&#96;（压缩要点，减少后续 token）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n## 4. 右侧栏：功能操作区（Toolbox Panel）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n右侧栏为垂直排列的主功能区，包含四大模块（按钮 + 子按钮）。\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n### 4.1 自评自查（Self-check）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 独立按钮：&#96;自评自查&#96;\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 交互：点击后智能体引导学生根据评分标准自评，输出**自评报告**并展示在中栏。\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 设计建议（MVP）：\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  - 先用 UI 题库（选择题/单选多选）+ 规则计分得出主观“最大问题维度”\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  - 再由 LLM 解释“为何判定该维度为主要短板”（可选）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n### 4.2 作文点评（Commentary）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n主按钮：&#96;作文点评&#96;  \\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n子按钮（5个）：\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- &#96;综合&#96;：覆盖立意/结构/论证/语言\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- &#96;立意&#96; / &#96;结构&#96; / &#96;论证&#96; / &#96;语言&#96;：专项点评\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n输出要求（统一 JSON → 渲染为对话气泡）：\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 必须给出 &#96;issues[]&#96;（至少2条）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 必须给出 &#96;evidence[]&#96;（引用 P段落 + 短引 + why）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- &#96;diagnosis.main_problem_dimension&#96; 用于提示学生本次优先修哪一块\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n### 4.3 修改处方（Prescription）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n主按钮：&#96;修改处方&#96;  \\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n子按钮（5个）：\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- &#96;综合&#96; / &#96;立意&#96; / &#96;结构&#96; / &#96;论证&#96; / &#96;语言&#96;\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n输出要求：\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 强可执行：&#96;next_steps[]&#96; 每条必须是“能照做的动作”，避免空泛建议\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 建议 3–5 条为宜\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 对应引用证据（说明为什么要改这处）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n### 4.4 微任务（Microtasks）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n主按钮：&#96;微任务&#96;  \\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n子按钮（4个）：\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- &#96;立意&#96; / &#96;结构&#96; / &#96;论证&#96; / &#96;语言&#96;\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n输出要求：\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 每个微任务强调“10分钟能做完”\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 必须包含自检规则（check_rule），让学生自己判断是否完成\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- 可选给一个示例（但要短）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n## 5. 技术架构与模块划分\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n### 5.1 总体架构（单体应用 + 模块化）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- Streamlit：UI + session_state 状态管理\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- core/actions.py：按钮路由（action → prompts → llm.py）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- core/ocr：PaddleOCR 识别与后处理\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- core/schemas.py：Pydantic 定义 JSON 输出结构（防止 UI 崩）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- core/paragraphing.py：分段、编号、证据引用定位\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n- core/caching.py：缓存（避免重复 OCR/重复调用 LLM）\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n### 5.2 建议目录结构\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;text\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\nessay-agent/\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  app.py\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  llm.py\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  requirements.txt\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  .env.example\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  core/\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    context.py\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    actions.py\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    prompts.py\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    schemas.py\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    paragraphing.py\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    caching.py\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    exporters.py          # 可选：导出学习报告\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    ocr/\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n      paddle_ocr.py\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n      postprocess.py\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  prompts/\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    system_base.md\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    chat_clarify.md\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    self_check.md\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    commentary_overall.md\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    commentary_dim.md\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    prescription_overall.md\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    prescription_dim.md\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n SpecStory Artifacts Directory\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\nThis directory is automatically created and maintained by the SpecStory extension to preserve your AI chat history.\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n## What's Here?\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n- &#96;.specstory/history&#96;: Contains auto-saved markdown files of your AI coding sessions (default path, configurable in &#96;specstory.outputPath&#96; setting)\\\\\\\\n    - Each file represents a separate AI chat session\\\\\\\\n    - If you enable auto-save, files are automatically updated as you work\\\\\\\\n    - You can enable/disable the auto-save feature in the SpecStory settings, it is disabled by default\\\\\\\\n- &#96;.specstory/.project.json&#96;: Contains the persistent project identity for the current workspace\\\\\\\\n    - This file is only present if you enable AI rules derivation\\\\\\\\n    - This is used to provide consistent project identity of your project, even as the workspace is moved or renamed\\\\\\\\n- &#96;.specstory/ai_rules_backups&#96;: Contains backups of the &#96;.cursor/rules/derived-cursor-rules.mdc&#96; or the &#96;.github/copilot-instructions.md&#96; file\\\\\\\\n    - Backups are automatically created each time the &#96;.cursor/rules/derived-cursor-rules.mdc&#96; or the &#96;.github/copilot-instructions.md&#96; file is updated\\\\\\\\n    - You can enable/disable the AI Rules derivation feature in the SpecStory settings, it is disabled by default\\\\\\\\n- &#96;.specstory/.gitignore&#96;: Contains directives to exclude non-essential contents of the &#96;.specstory&#96; directory from version control\\\\\\\\n    - Add &#96;/history&#96; to exclude the auto-saved chat history from version control\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Valuable Uses\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n- Capture: Keep your context window up-to-date when starting new Chat/Composer sessions via @ references\\\\\\\\n- Search: For previous prompts and code snippets \\\\\\\\n- Learn: Meta-analyze your patterns and learn from your past experiences\\\\\\\\n- Derive: Keep the AI on course with your past decisions by automatically deriving rules from your AI interactions\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n## Version Control\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\nWe recommend keeping this directory under version control to maintain a history of your AI interactions. However, if you prefer not to version these files, you can exclude them by adding this to your &#96;.gitignore&#96;:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n.specstory/**\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nWe recommend __not__ keeping the &#96;.specstory/ai_rules_backups&#96; directory under version control if you are already using git to version your AI rules, and committing regularly. You can exclude it by adding this to your &#96;.gitignore&#96;:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n.specstory/ai_rules_backups\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Searching Your Codebase\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\nWhen searching your codebase, search results may include your previous AI coding interactions. To focus solely on your actual code files, you can exclude the AI interaction history from search results.\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\nTo exclude AI interaction history:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n1. Open the \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Find in Files\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" search in Cursor or VSCode (Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + F)\\\\\\\\n2. Navigate to the \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"files to exclude\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" section\\\\\\\\n3. Add the following pattern:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n.specstory/*\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\nThis will ensure your searches only return results from your working codebase files.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Notes\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- Auto-save only works when Cursor or VSCode flushes sqlite database data to disk. This results in a small delay after the AI response is complete before SpecStory can save the history.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Settings\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\nYou can control auto-saving behavior in Cursor or VSCode:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n1. Open Cursor/Code → Settings → VS Code Settings (Cmd/Ctrl + ,)\\\\\\\\n2. Search for \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SpecStory\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n3. Find \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Auto Save\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" setting to enable/disable\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\nAuto-save occurs when changes are detected in the sqlite database, or every 2 minutes as a safety net.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":69}\\\",\\\"toolCallBinary\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"53fdf683-6f2d-455d-b22a-3be555d15356\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"73908c8c-6dc2-4fe7-a9f0-a665d47bd119\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-01T14:28 Actions\n    Actions --&gt; Prompts\n    Prompts --&gt; PromptFiles\n    Actions --&gt; LLM\n    LLM --&gt; Schemas\n    LeftPanel --&gt; PaddleOCR\n    PaddleOCR --&gt; PostProcess\n    CenterPanel --&gt; Context\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 目录结构\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nMLsllm/\n  app.py                    # Streamlit 主入口\n  llm.py                    # LLM API 封装（OpenAI 兼容，stream + JSON 强制）\n  requirements.txt          # 已存在\n  .env.example              # 环境变量模板\n\n  core/\n    __init__.py\n    context.py              # SessionState 上下文管理\n    actions.py              # 按钮 -&gt; Streamlit 卡片渲染\n\n    ocr/\n      __init__.py\n      paddle_ocr.py         # PaddleOCR 封装\n      postprocess.py        # 置信度过滤、行合并\n\n  prompts/\n    system_base.md          # 系统角色基础 prompt\n    chat_clarify.md         # 对话追问 prompt\n    self_check.md           # 自评自查 prompt\n    commentary_overall.md   # 综合点评\n    commentary_dim.md       # 单维度点评（立意/结构/论证/语言）\n    prescription_overall.md # 综合修改处方\n    prescription_dim.md     # 单维度修改处方\n    microtask_dim.md        # 微任务生成\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n## Phase 1: 基础设施层\n\n### 1.1 &#96;.env.example&#96; 和配置\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nOPENAI_API_KEY=sk-xxx\nOPENAI_BASE_URL=https://api.openai.com/v1\nOPENAI_MODEL=gpt-4o\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n使用 &#96;python-dotenv&#96; 加载，在 &#96;llm.py&#96; 中读取。\n\n### 1.2 &#96;llm.py&#96; -- LLM API 封装\n\n核心职责：\n- 使用 &#96;openai&#96; SDK，支持自定义 &#96;base_url&#96;（兼容 DeepSeek/智谱/通义千问等）\n- 提供两个主要函数：\n  - &#96;call_llm_stream(messages, json_mode=False) -&gt; Generator[str]&#96;：流式输出，逐 chunk yield\n  - &#96;call_llm(messages, json_mode=False) -&gt; str&#96;：非流式，返回完整文本\n- &#96;json_mode=True&#96; 时设置 &#96;response_format={\"type\": \"json_object\"}&#96;\n- 使用 &#96;tenacity&#96; 做重试（3 次，指数退避）\n- 使用 &#96;loguru&#96; 记录请求日志\n\n### 1.3 &#96;core/schemas.py&#96; -- Pydantic 输出模型\n\n定义所有 LLM 输出的 JSON 结构，用于解析校验。解析失败时回退为纯文本显示。\n\n关键模型：\n- &#96;CommentaryResult&#96;: &#96;score_summary&#96;, &#96;issues[]&#96;, &#96;evidence[]&#96;, &#96;highlights[]&#96;, &#96;diagnosis.main_problem_dimension&#96;\n- &#96;PrescriptionResult&#96;: &#96;next_steps[]&#96;（每条含 &#96;action&#96;, &#96;reason&#96;, &#96;evidence_ref&#96;）\n- &#96;MicrotaskResult&#96;: &#96;tasks[]&#96;（每条含 &#96;title&#96;, &#96;instruction&#96;, &#96;check_rule&#96;, &#96;example&#96;, &#96;time_estimate&#96;）\n- &#96;SelfCheckResult&#96;: &#96;dimension_scores{}&#96;, &#96;main_weakness&#96;, &#96;explanation&#96;\n- &#96;ChatClarifyResult&#96;: &#96;questions[]&#96;, &#96;chat_summary&#96;\n\n每个模型提供 &#96;parse_or_fallback(raw_text) -&gt; Union[Model, str]&#96; 类方法。\n\n### 1.4 &#96;core/context.py&#96; -- Session 上下文管理\n\n管理 &#96;st.session_state&#96; 中的所有状态：\n- &#96;title&#96;: 作文题目\n- &#96;word_requirement&#96;: 字数要求\n- &#96;essay_text&#96;: 作文正文（OCR 后或手动输入）\n- &#96;paragraphs&#96;: 分段后的 &#96;{para_id: text}&#96; 字典\n- &#96;chat_history&#96;: &#96;list[dict]&#96;（role/content/action_type）\n- &#96;chat_summary&#96;: 压缩后的对话摘要\n- 提供 &#96;get_context_for_prompt() -&gt; dict&#96; 方法，组装发送给 LLM 的上下文\n\n### 1.5 &#96;core/caching.py&#96; -- 缓存\n\n- 基于 &#96;st.cache_data&#96; / &#96;st.cache_resource&#96; 实现\n- OCR 结果按图片 hash 缓存\n- LLM 结果按 (action_type + essay_hash) 缓存（可选，避免重复调用）\n\n---\n\n## Phase 2: OCR 模块\n\n### 2.1 &#96;core/ocr/paddle_ocr.py&#96;\n\n- 封装 PaddleOCR 初始化（&#96;use_angle_cls=True, lang='ch'&#96;）\n- &#96;ocr_image(image_bytes) -&gt; list[OcrLine]&#96;：返回每行文本 + 置信度 + 坐标\n- 使用 &#96;@st.cache_resource&#96; 缓存 PaddleOCR 模型实例\n\n### 2.2 &#96;core/ocr/postprocess.py&#96;\n\n- &#96;merge_lines(lines) -&gt; str&#96;：按坐标排序、合并为连续文本\n- &#96;get_low_confidence_lines(lines, threshold=0.8) -&gt; list&#96;：返回低置信度行列表\n- 处理常见 OCR 错误（如标点修正）\n\n---\n\n## Phase 3: 文本处理\n\n### 3.1 &#96;core/paragraphing.py&#96;\n\n- &#96;split_paragraphs(text) -&gt; list[Paragraph]&#96;：按空行/换行切分自然段\n- &#96;number_paragraphs(paragraphs) -&gt; str&#96;：生成 &#96;P1: ...\\nP2: ...&#96; 格式\n- &#96;Paragraph&#96; 数据类：&#96;para_id&#96;, &#96;text&#96;, &#96;start_char&#96;, &#96;end_char&#96;\n\n---\n\n## Phase 4: Prompt 模板系统\n\n### 4.1 &#96;core/prompts.py&#96; -- 模板加载器\n\n- 从 &#96;prompts/&#96; 目录加载 &#96;.md&#96; 文件\n- 使用 Python &#96;str.format_map()&#96; 或简单占位符替换（&#96;{title}&#96;, &#96;{essay}&#96;, &#96;{paragraphs}&#96;, &#96;{dimension}&#96;, &#96;{chat_summary}&#96;, &#96;{commentary_result}&#96; 等）\n- &#96;build_messages(action, context) -&gt; list[dict]&#96;：组装 system + user messages\n\n### 4.2 Prompt 模板文件（8 个）\n\n从 &#96;prompt_raw.md&#96; 提取已有 prompt 并结构化为模板文件，补充缺失的 prompt：\n\n| 文件 | 来源 | 说明 |\n|------|------|------|\n| &#96;system_base.md&#96; | 新建 | 系统角色定义 |\n| &#96;chat_clarify.md&#96; | 新建 | 对话追问，引导学生澄清论点/材料/亮点 |\n| &#96;self_check.md&#96; | 新建 | 自评自查，LLM 引导学生根据评分标准自评 |\n| &#96;commentary_overall.md&#96; | 从 prompt_raw.md 提取 | 综合点评 |\n| &#96;commentary_dim.md&#96; | 从 prompt_raw.md 提取 | 单维度点评（{dimension} 参数化） |\n| &#96;prescription_overall.md&#96; | 从 prompt_raw.md 提取 | 综合修改处方 |\n| &#96;prescription_dim.md&#96; | 从 prompt_raw.md 提取 | 单维度修改处方 |\n| &#96;microtask_dim.md&#96; | 新建 | 微任务生成（参照项目文档 4.4 节要求） |\n\n---\n\n## Phase 5: 按钮路由与动作系统\n\n### 5.1 &#96;core/actions.py&#96;\n\n核心路由函数 &#96;dispatch_action(action_type, dimension=None)&#96;：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;python\nACTION_MAP = {\n    \"self_check\":           (\"self_check.md\",           SelfCheckResult),\n    \"commentary_overall\":   (\"commentary_overall.md\",   CommentaryResult),\n    \"commentary_dim\":       (\"commentary_dim.md\",       CommentaryResult),\n    \"prescription_overall\": (\"prescription_overall.md\", PrescriptionResult),\n    \"prescription_dim\":     (\"prescription_dim.md\",     PrescriptionResult),\n    \"microtask_dim\":        (\"microtask_dim.md\",        MicrotaskResult),\n    \"chat_clarify\":         (\"chat_clarify.md\",         ChatClarifyResult),\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n流程：\n1. 从 &#96;context.py&#96; 获取当前上下文\n2. 通过 &#96;prompts.py&#96; 构建 messages\n3. 调用 &#96;llm.py&#96; 的流式接口\n4. 尝试用对应 Pydantic 模型解析 JSON，失败则回退为纯文本\n5. 将结果追加到 &#96;chat_history&#96;\n6. 返回结果供 UI 渲染\n\n### 5.2 &#96;core/render.py&#96; -- 结果渲染\n\n- &#96;render_commentary(result)&#96;: 渲染点评卡片（问题列表 + 证据引用 + 诊断）\n- &#96;render_prescription(result)&#96;: 渲染处方卡片（步骤列表 + 引用）\n- &#96;render_microtask(result)&#96;: 渲染微任务卡片（任务 + 自检规则）\n- &#96;render_self_check(result)&#96;: 渲染自评报告\n- &#96;render_fallback(text)&#96;: 纯文本 Markdown 渲染（JSON 解析失败时）\n\n---\n\n## Phase 6: Streamlit UI 主界面\n\n### 6.1 &#96;app.py&#96; -- 三栏布局\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;python\nst.set_page_config(layout=\"wide\", page_title=\"高中生议论文评改\")\n\nleft, center, right = st.columns([1, 2, 1])\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**左栏 (left)**:\n- &#96;st.text_input(\"作文题目\")&#96;\n- &#96;st.text_input(\"字数要求\")&#96;\n- &#96;st.file_uploader(\"上传作文图片\", type=[\"jpg\",\"png\",\"jpeg\"])&#96;\n- &#96;st.text_area(\"作文正文（可编辑）\")&#96;\n- &#96;st.button(\"OCR 识别\")&#96; -- 调用 OCR 模块，结果写入 text_area\n- &#96;st.button(\"分段编号\")&#96; -- 调用 paragraphing，显示 P1/P2/...\n\n**中栏 (center)**:\n- 顶部固定标题：\"高中生议论文评改\"\n- 历史对话展示区：遍历 &#96;chat_history&#96;，用 &#96;st.chat_message&#96; 渲染\n- 底部输入框：&#96;st.chat_input(\"与AI对话...\")&#96;，提交触发 &#96;chat_clarify&#96; action\n- 流式输出：使用 &#96;st.write_stream()&#96; 逐字显示 LLM 回复\n\n**右栏 (right)**:\n- &#96;st.button(\"自评自查\")&#96;\n- &#96;st.subheader(\"作文点评\")&#96; + 5 个按钮（综合/立意/结构/论证/语言）\n- &#96;st.subheader(\"修改处方\")&#96; + 5 个按钮\n- &#96;st.subheader(\"微任务\")&#96; + 4 个按钮（立意/结构/论证/语言）\n- 每个按钮点击 -&gt; &#96;dispatch_action()&#96; -&gt; 结果进入中栏对话流\n\n---\n\n## Phase 7: 集成测试与打磨\n\n- 验证完整流程：输入作文 -&gt; OCR -&gt; 分段 -&gt; 点评 -&gt; 处方 -&gt; 微任务\n- 验证 JSON 解析失败时的 fallback 显示\n- 验证流式输出的用户体验\n- 验证 session_state 在多轮交互中的稳定性\n- 添加错误处理：API key 未配置提示、OCR 模型加载失败提示、网络超时提示\n\n---\n\n## 关键设计决策\n\n1. **JSON 解析策略**: 尝试 JSON 解析 + Pydantic 校验，失败则回退为 Markdown 文本直接显示，保证不崩溃\n2. **流式输出**: 对话和按钮触发的 LLM 调用均使用流式输出，提升体验\n3. **Prompt 参数化**: 点评/处方的\"立意/结构/论证/语言\"四个维度共用同一模板，通过 &#96;{dimension}&#96; 参数区分，减少重复\n4. **对话历史**: 所有按钮输出统一进入中栏对话流，用 &#96;action_type&#96; 标记来源，渲染时区分样式\n5. **OCR 模型懒加载**: 使用 &#96;@st.cache_resource&#96; 确保 PaddleOCR 只初始化一次\n",

---

## 项目完成总结

### 创建的文件（24 个）

**根目录（3 个）**
- `app.py` — Streamlit 三栏主界面（左输入/中对话/右功能按钮）
- `llm.py` — OpenAI 兼容 API 封装（流式 + 非流式 + JSON mode + 重试）
- `.env.example` — 环境变量模板

**core/ 模块（9 个）**
- `core/__init__.py`
- `core/context.py` — Session 状态管理（作文/段落/对话历史/摘要）
- `core/actions.py` — 按钮动作路由（15 个按钮 → prompt → LLM → 解析）
- `core/prompts.py` — 模板加载器 + 各维度评判标准 + 变量渲染
- `core/schemas.py` — 5 个 Pydantic 输出模型（Commentary/Prescription/Microtask/SelfCheck/ChatClarify），均带 `parse_or_fallback`
- `core/paragraphing.py` — 分段编号（P1/P2/...）
- `core/caching.py` — OCR 结果缓存
- `core/render.py` — 结构化 JSON → Streamlit 卡片渲染（6 种渲染器）
- `core/ocr/__init__.py`
- `core/ocr/paddle_ocr.py` — PaddleOCR 封装（懒加载 + 缓存）
- `core/ocr/postprocess.py` — OCR 后处理（行合并/置信度过滤/错误修正）

**prompts/ 模板（8 个）**
- `system_base.md` — 系统角色
- `chat_clarify.md` — 对话追问
- `self_check.md` — 自评自查
- `commentary_overall.md` — 综合点评（从 prompt_raw.md 提取）
- `commentary_dim.md` — 单维度点评（参数化 `{dimension}`）
- `prescription_overall.md` — 综合处方
- `prescription_dim.md` — 单维度处方
- `microtask_dim.md` — 微任务生成

### 启动方式

```bash
# 1. 复制并配置环境变量
cp .env.example .env
# 编辑 .env 填入你的 API Key 和 Base URL

# 2. 安装依赖
pip install -r requirements.txt

# 3. 启动应用
streamlit run app.py
```

Pydantic 2.x 已经装好了（conda list 显示的是旧的，pip 覆盖了）。现在只需要安装 `paddleocr`。以下是完整的启动步骤：

---

## 启动步骤

### 1. 激活 conda 环境并安装缺失依赖

```powershell
conda activate LLM-api
pip install paddleocr
```

### 2. 配置 API Key

在项目根目录 `d:\CodePrj\MLsllm` 下创建 `.env` 文件（复制 `.env.example` 并填入你的真实 Key）：

```powershell
cd d:\CodePrj\MLsllm
copy .env.example .env
```

然后用编辑器打开 `.env`，把三个值改成你实际使用的：

```
OPENAI_API_KEY=你的真实API-Key
OPENAI_BASE_URL=你的API地址（如 https://api.deepseek.com/v1）
OPENAI_MODEL=你的模型名（如 deepseek-chat）
```

### 3. 启动 Streamlit 应用

```powershell
conda activate LLM-api
cd d:\CodePrj\MLsllm
streamlit run app.py
```

### 4. 在浏览器中访问

启动后终端会输出类似以下内容：

```
  You can now view your Streamlit app in your browser.

  Local URL: http://localhost:8501
  Network URL: http://192.168.x.x:8501
```

在浏览器中打开 **http://localhost:8501** 即可看到三栏界面。

---

## 快速验证（不需要 OCR）

即使不安装 `paddleocr`，你也可以直接在左栏的"作文正文"文本框中**粘贴一篇作文**，然后点击右栏的功能按钮来测试点评、处方等功能。OCR 功能只在上传图片时才会用到。

## 如果端口被占用

可以指定其他端口：

```powershell
streamlit run app.py --server.port 8502
```

然后访问 `http://localhost:8502`。

[概览 - MiniMax 开放平台文档中心](https://platform.minimaxi.com/)<br/><br/># MiniMax Anthropic API 接入指南<br/><br/>## 支持的模型名称<br/><br/>MiniMax 通过 Anthropic API 兼容接口支持以下模型[1]：<br/><br/>\| 模型名称 \| 上下文窗口 \| 描述 \|<br/>\|---------\|---------\|------\|<br/>\| `MiniMax-M2.5` \| 204,800 \| 顶尖性能与极致性价比（输出速度约 60 TPS） \|<br/>\| `MiniMax-M2.5-highspeed` \| 204,800 \| M2.5 极速版，更快更敏捷（输出速度约 100 TPS） \|<br/>\| `MiniMax-M2.1` \| 204,800 \| 强大多语言编程能力（输出速度约 60 TPS） \|<br/>\| `MiniMax-M2.1-highspeed` \| 204,800 \| M2.1 极速版，更快更敏捷（输出速度约 100 TPS） \|<br/>\| `MiniMax-M2` \| 204,800 \| 专为高效编码与 Agent 工作流而生 \|<br/><br/>## 快速接入步骤<br/><br/>1. **安装 Anthropic SDK**[1]<br/>   ```bash<br/>   pip install anthropic<br/>   ```<br/><br/>2. **配置环境变量**[1]<br/>   ```bash<br/>   export ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=https://api.minimaxi.com/anthropic<br/>   export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=$\{YOUR_API_KEY\}<br/>   ```<br/><br/>3. **调用 API**[1]<br/>   在代码中使用上述任一模型名称即可通过 Anthropic SDK 调用 MiniMax 模型<br/><br/>## 兼容性说明<br/><br/>Anthropic API 兼容接口支持文本消息、工具调用、推理内容等功能，但暂不支持图像和文档输入[1]。<br/><br/>**注意**：如需使用其他 MiniMax 模型，请使用标准的 MiniMax API 接口[1]。 |

## 当前状态

| 项目 | 结果 |
|------|------|
| SDK 安装 | anthropic 0.84.0 已安装 |
| API 连通 | 成功连接到 `api.minimaxi.com` |
| 认证 | API Key 有效（未报 401） |
| 调用 | **余额不足**，返回 500 + `insufficient balance (1008)` |

## 你需要做的

去 MiniMax 开放平台 [platform.minimaxi.com](https://platform.minimaxi.com) 充值或领取免费额度。充值后再运行：

```powershell
conda activate LLM-api
cd d:\CodePrj\MLsllm
python test_llm.py
```

三个测试通过后，就可以启动 Streamlit 应用了：

```powershell
streamlit run app.py
```

## 已完成的改动

1. **`llm.py`** — 重写为双后端架构，通过 `LLM_PROVIDER` 环境变量切换 `anthropic` / `openai`
2. **`.env.example`** — 更新为 MiniMax + Anthropic 配置模板
3. **`.env`** — 已用你的 API Key 创建（充值后即可使用）
4. **`test_llm.py`** — 后台测试脚本，包含非流式/流式/JSON 三项测试

充值生效了，API 已连通。结果分析：

| 测试 | 结果 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| 测试 1: 非流式 | 失败 (AttributeError) | 返回格式解析有 bug |
| 测试 2: 流式 | **成功** (59 字符) | 正常输出了中文评语 |
| 测试 3: JSON 模式 | 失败 (AttributeError) | 同测试 1 的问题 |

流式调用成功说明 API Key、网络、模型都没问题。非流式调用报 `AttributeError`，说明 MiniMax 的 Anthropic 兼容接口返回的数据结构和标准 Anthropic 略有差异。让我调试一下：

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="run_terminal_command_v2">
<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: conda activate LLM-api; cd d:\CodePrj\MLsllm; python -c "
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv()
import os, anthropic

client = anthropic.Anthropic(
    api_key=os.getenv('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'),
    base_url=os.getenv('ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL'),
)

resp = client.messages.create(
    model='MiniMax-M2.5',
    max_tokens=256,
    messages=[{'role': 'user', 'content': '你好，请说一句话'}],
)

print('type(resp):', type(resp))
print('resp:', resp)
print()
print('type(resp.content):', type(resp.content))
print('resp.content:', resp.content)
if resp.content:
    item = resp.content[0]
    print('type(item):', type(item))
    print('dir(item):', [a for a in dir(item) if not a.startswith('_')])
    print('item:', item)
"
</summary>

```bash
conda activate LLM-api; cd d:\CodePrj\MLsllm; python -c "

---

找到问题了。MiniMax-M2.5 默认开启了 **extended thinking（深度思考）**，返回的 `content` 列表里有两种 block：

1. `ThinkingBlock` — 模型的思考过程（`type='thinking'`），没有 `.text` 属性，只有 `.thinking`
2. `TextBlock` — 实际回复（`type='text'`），有 `.text` 属性

我们的代码 `resp.content[0].text` 直接取第一个元素，拿到的是 `ThinkingBlock`，它没有 `.text` 属性所以报 `AttributeError`。需要过滤出 `TextBlock`。

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="read_file_v2">
<details><summary>Tool use: **read_file_v2** • Read file: d:\CodePrj\MLsllm\llm.py</summary>

</details>
</tool-use>

---

问题在第 63 行：`resp.content[0].text` — MiniMax-M2.5 开启了 extended thinking，`content[0]` 是 `ThinkingBlock`（没有 `.text`），`content[1]` 才是 `TextBlock`。需要过滤取 `type='text'` 的 block。

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file_v2">

<details><summary>Tool use: **edit_file_v2** • Edit file: d:\CodePrj\MLsllm\llm.py</summary>

</details>

</tool-use>

三项测试全部通过。结果分析：

## 测试结果

| 测试 | 状态 | 详情 |
|------|------|------|
| 测试 1: 非流式调用 | **成功** | 返回 336 字符，给出了完整的点评 + 改进建议 + 优化示例 |
| 测试 2: 流式调用 | **成功** | 返回 82 字符，逐字输出正常 |
| 测试 3: JSON 模式 | **成功** | 返回 163 字符，格式为 `{"score": 8, "comment": "..."}` |

（终端显示乱码是因为 PowerShell 的编码问题，实际内容是正确的中文。）

## 修复了什么

MiniMax-M2.5 默认开启了 **extended thinking（深度思考）**，API 返回的 `content` 列表中包含两种 block：

- `ThinkingBlock`（`type='thinking'`）— 模型的内部思考过程，没有 `.text` 属性
- `TextBlock`（`type='text'`）— 实际回复内容

原代码直接取 `content[0].text`，拿到的是 `ThinkingBlock` 导致 `AttributeError`。修复后通过 `_extract_text()` 函数过滤出 `type='text'` 的 block，问题解决。

现在可以启动应用了：

```powershell
conda activate LLM-api
cd d:\CodePrj\MLsllm
streamlit run app.py
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="run_terminal_command_v2">
<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: conda activate LLM-api; cd d:\CodePrj\MLsllm; python -c "
import base64, io, requests
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv()
from core.ocr.baidu_ocr import _get_access_token
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont

img = Image.new('RGB', (600, 100), 'white')
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)
try:
    font = ImageFont.truetype('simhei.ttf', 32)
except OSError:
    font = ImageFont.load_default()
draw.text((20, 30), 'test ocr', fill='black', font=font)
buf = io.BytesIO()
img.save(buf, format='PNG')
img_b64 = base64.b64encode(buf.getvalue()).decode()
token = _get_access_token()

eps = {
    'general_basic': 'https://aip.baidubce.com/rest/2.0/ocr/v1/general_basic',
    'accurate_basic': 'https://aip.baidubce.com/rest/2.0/ocr/v1/accurate_basic',
    'general': 'https://aip.baidubce.com/rest/2.0/ocr/v1/general',
    'accurate': 'https://aip.baidubce.com/rest/2.0/ocr/v1/accurate',
    'handwriting': 'https://aip.baidubce.com/rest/2.0/ocr/v1/handwriting',
}
for name, url in eps.items():
    r = requests.post(url, params={'access_token': token},
        headers={'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'},
        data={'image': img_b64}, timeout=15).json()
    if 'error_code' in r:
        print(f'{name:20s} FAIL [{r[\"error_code\"]}] {r.get(\"error_msg\",\"\")}')
    else:
        has_loc = any('location' in w for w in r.get('words_result', []))
        print(f'{name:20s} OK   location={has_loc}')
"
</summary>

```bash
conda activate LLM-api; cd d:\CodePrj\MLsllm; python -c "
import base64, io, requests
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv()
from core.ocr.baidu_ocr import _get_access_token
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont

img = Image.new('RGB', (600, 100), 'white')
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)
try:
    font = ImageFont.truetype('simhei.ttf', 32)
except OSError:
    font = ImageFont.load_default()
draw.text((20, 30), 'test ocr', fill='black', font=font)
buf = io.BytesIO()
img.save(buf, format='PNG')
img_b64 = base64.b64encode(buf.getvalue()).decode()
token = _get_access_token()

eps = {
    'general_basic': 'https://aip.baidubce.com/rest/2.0/ocr/v1/general_basic',
    'accurate_basic': 'https://aip.baidubce.com/rest/2.0/ocr/v1/accurate_basic',
    'general': 'https://aip.baidubce.com/rest/2.0/ocr/v1/general',
    'accurate': 'https://aip.baidubce.com/rest/2.0/ocr/v1/accurate',
    'handwriting': 'https://aip.baidubce.com/rest/2.0/ocr/v1/handwriting',
}
for name, url in eps.items():
    r = requests.post(url, params={'access_token': token},
        headers={'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'},
        data={'image': img_b64}, timeout=15).json()
    if 'error_code' in r:
        print(f'{name:20s} FAIL [{r[\"error_code\"]}] {r.get(\"error_msg\",\"\")}')
    else:
        has_loc = any('location' in w for w in r.get('words_result', []))
        print(f'{name:20s} OK   location={has_loc}')
"

找到两个问题：

**问题 1（OCR 结果不显示在文本框）：** 看第 144-155 行的执行顺序 — `_do_ocr()` 在第 145 行调用，它通过 `ctx.set_val("essay_text", text)` 写入了 session_state。但紧接着在第 149-155 行，`st.text_area` 用 `key="input_essay"` 渲染，Streamlit 的 widget key 机制会用 widget 自身的值覆盖 session_state 中的值。而且 OCR 完成后没有 `st.rerun()`，所以 text_area 不会刷新。

**问题 2（废弃 API 警告）：** `use_container_width=True` 在新版 Streamlit 中已改为 `width='stretch'`。

一起修复：

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file_v2">

<details><summary>Tool use: **edit_file_v2** • Edit file: d:\CodePrj\MLsllm\app.py</summary>

</details>

</tool-use>

---

Now there's a subtle issue: after `st.rerun()`, the text_area's `value=ctx.get("essay_text")` will read the OCR result from session_state, but the widget key `input_essay` might still hold the old value and overwrite it. The fix is to not have the text_area write back on every render — only on user edits via `on_change`. But there's still a conflict: Streamlit widgets with keys always sync their value back to session_state. Let me restructure to avoid the key conflict:

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file_v2">

<details><summary>Tool use: **edit_file_v2** • Edit file: d:\CodePrj\MLsllm\app.py</summary>

</details>

</tool-use>

Clean. Here's what was wrong and what I fixed:

**Root cause:** Streamlit widgets with a `key` parameter sync bidirectionally with `session_state`. The flow was:

1. `_do_ocr()` writes OCR text to `session_state["essay_text"]` via `ctx.set_val()`
2. But the `st.text_area` has `key="input_essay"`, which means Streamlit stores the widget's current value (empty or old text) in `session_state["input_essay"]`
3. On the next render, `value=ctx.get("essay_text")` is ignored because Streamlit prioritizes the widget key's stored value
4. No `st.rerun()` was called after OCR, so the page didn't even re-render

**Fix (two parts):**

1. **Added `st.rerun()` after `_do_ocr()`** (line 148) — forces the page to re-render after OCR completes
2. **Added a `_ocr_just_ran` flag** — when OCR or paragraph numbering modifies `essay_text`, the flag tells the text_area to refresh its widget key value from session_state before rendering. This breaks the stale-key problem.

Also fixed the `st.image` deprecation: `use_container_width=True` changed to `width="stretch"`.

There are two separate problems here:

1. **JSON 解析失败 (`char 0`)** — the LLM response contains a "thinking" block before the actual text, and in streaming mode we're collecting ALL chunks (including thinking content), but the final text isn't valid JSON because it includes thinking tokens mixed in.

2. **OCR 垃圾内容** — the OCR picked up answer sheet boilerplate text, which pollutes the essay. This is a separate issue we can address later.

Now I see the full picture. The problem is:

1. **Streaming** collects text chunks and shows them in the UI as markdown (good for UX)
2. After streaming, `parse_result` tries to parse the full text as JSON
3. But MiniMax-M2.5 with extended thinking sometimes outputs thinking content mixed into the stream, or the model wraps JSON in markdown code blocks (` ```json ... ``` `)
4. The error `Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)` means the text is **empty** when parsed — this happens because the stream yields thinking tokens that get collected, but the actual text content is empty or the JSON is wrapped in markdown

Now I can see the problem clearly. The stream output is wrapped in markdown code fences:

```json
{...}

The LLM wraps its JSON response in ` ```json ... ``` ` markdown code blocks. When we try to parse this, `json.loads()` fails because the text starts with ` ```json ` instead of `{`.

Also, the non-streaming output returns clean JSON (no code fences), which means `_extract_text` handles it correctly, but the streaming path doesn't strip the code fences.

Now I have a complete understanding of the problem. There are **two issues** to fix:

**Issue 1: Streaming output wraps JSON in markdown code fences.** The debug test confirmed that `_anthropic_stream` yields text like `` ```json\n{...}\n``` ``. When chunks are joined, the full text starts with `` ```json `` instead of `{`, so `json.loads()` fails at char 0.

**Issue 2: When JSON parse fails, `render_fallback` renders the raw JSON as markdown.** Since it's wrapped in `` ```json ... ``` ``, Streamlit renders it as a code block, which is ugly.

The fix needs to happen in two places:

1. **`core/schemas.py` — `parse_or_fallback`**: Strip markdown code fences before attempting `json.loads()`. This is the most robust fix because it handles the problem regardless of where the text comes from.

2. **`llm.py` — system prompt**: Strengthen the instruction to not wrap JSON in code fences. (Belt-and-suspenders approach — LLMs don't always obey.)

3. **`core/render.py` — `render_fallback`**: When fallback text looks like JSON, try to render it more cleanly instead of dumping raw JSON as markdown.

Let me implement these fixes:

---

- [ ] Strengthen system prompt to tell LLM not to wrap JSON in code fences
- [ ] Improve render_fallback to handle raw JSON text more gracefully
- [ ] Ensure chat history re-parsing also uses the fixed parser
- [ ] Test the fix with debug script

</details>
</tool-use>

---

**Root cause analysis:**

MiniMax-M2.5 via the Anthropic streaming API wraps JSON output in markdown code fences (`` ```json ... ``` ``), even when instructed to output pure JSON. The `parse_or_fallback` method tries `json.loads()` on the raw text which starts with `` ```json `` — not valid JSON — so it fails at char 0 and falls back to rendering the entire raw JSON string as markdown in the chat.

I'll fix this in three layers:

1. **Strip code fences** before parsing
2. **Stronger prompt** to discourage fences
3. **Cleaner fallback rendering** if parsing still fails

Here's a summary of the problem and fixes:

---

**Root cause:** MiniMax-M2.5 via the Anthropic streaming API wraps JSON output in markdown code fences (`` ```json ... ``` ``), even when instructed to output pure JSON. `json.loads()` fails because the text starts with `` ```json `` instead of `{`.

**Three-layer fix applied:**

1. **`core/schemas.py`** — Added `_strip_code_fences()` that removes `` ```json ... ``` `` wrapping before `json.loads()`. This is the primary fix — it handles the problem regardless of whether the LLM obeys the prompt or not.

2. **`llm.py`** — Strengthened the system prompt from `"请严格以 JSON 格式输出"` to explicitly say `"不要使用 ```json 代码块包裹，直接以 { 开头输出合法 JSON"`. The test confirmed this already made the model stop wrapping in fences.

3. **`core/render.py`** — Improved `render_fallback()` so that if parsing still fails and the text looks like JSON, it renders with `st.code(..., language="json")` (formatted code block) instead of dumping raw JSON as markdown. This makes the worst-case fallback much more readable.

All edge cases tested and passing. You can restart the Streamlit app to see the fix in action.

---

The test results are very revealing. Looking at the **逐行结果** from the three-column OCR, the lines are now in correct reading order (column 1 → column 2 → column 3), which is a huge improvement. However, the `merge_lines` function is still merging by y-coordinate across all columns, which re-scrambles the text.

The issue is that `merge_lines` in `postprocess.py` sorts ALL lines by y-coordinate globally, which defeats the purpose of our column-ordered output. I need to modify the merge logic so that when lines come from `ocr_columns` (already in correct reading order), they are simply concatenated sequentially rather than re-sorted by y.

Let me add a `merge_lines_sequential` function that respects the pre-sorted order:

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file_v2">

<details><summary>Tool use: **edit_file_v2** • Edit file: d:\CodePrj\MLsllm\core\ocr\postprocess.py</summary>

</details>

</tool-use>

---

Now update `app.py` to pass `presorted=True` when using column OCR:

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file_v2">

<details><summary>Tool use: **edit_file_v2** • Edit file: d:\CodePrj\MLsllm\app.py</summary>

</details>

</tool-use>

---

Also update the test script to use `presorted=True` for the column OCR path:

---

<details><summary>Tool use: **edit_file_v2** • Edit file: d:\CodePrj\MLsllm\test_ocr_columns.py</summary>

</details>

</tool-use>

---

Excellent! The results are dramatically improved. Compare:

**Before (no column split):** Text from all 3 columns mixed together on the same lines — completely unreadable:
> `而理解的稀缺,往往源于我们在当今算法编织的信息巨网中,理解的医乏在本质上是思维的在信息洪流中的迷失与浮躁。在海我们轻点屏幕就能纵览全球资讯,情性...`

**After (column split + presorted):** Text flows correctly column by column:
> Column 1: `作文.(70分)` → `信息易得,更需理解` → `在当今算法编织的信息巨网中` → ...
> Column 2: `捅就会破。` → `而理解的稀缺,往往源于我们` → ...
> Column 3: `层面上的质变。` → `理解的要正在本质上是思维的` → ...

There are still some junk lines (答题区域提示、▲400、66、D、1000 etc.) and some column-seam artifacts (like `中,` and `传` and `未` being on separate lines from overlap). These are exactly what the AI cleanup button will fix.

All done. Here's a summary of everything that was changed:

---

## Changes Summary

### 1. Three-column image splitting OCR

**New file: `core/ocr/column_split.py`**
- `split_columns(image_bytes, n_cols=3, overlap_px=20)` — crops the image into N columns with 20px overlap on each side to avoid cutting through characters
- `ocr_columns(image_bytes, ocr_fn, n_cols=3)` — splits the image, calls the OCR function on each column separately, sorts each column's results by y-coordinate, then concatenates columns in left-to-right order

**Modified: `core/ocr/postprocess.py`**
- Added `presorted=True` parameter to `merge_lines()` — when True, lines are joined sequentially (preserving column order) instead of being re-sorted by y-coordinate globally

### 2. AI intelligent cleanup button

**New file: `core/ocr/ai_cleanup.py`**
- `cleanup_ocr_stream(ocr_text)` — sends the raw OCR text to the LLM with a cleanup prompt, streams the cleaned result back

**New file: `prompts/ocr_cleanup.md`**
- Prompt template instructing the LLM to: remove answer sheet boilerplate, fix column-seam broken sentences, fix OCR errors, preserve paragraph structure, and not alter the essay's actual content

### 3. Updated app.py

- `_do_ocr()` now uses `ocr_columns()` for multi-column splitting (configurable via `OCR_COLUMNS` env var, default 3)
- Added `_do_ai_cleanup()` function — streams LLM cleanup and replaces the essay text
- Added two side-by-side buttons: **"OCR 识别"** and **"AI 智能整理"**

### 4. Test script

**New file: `test_ocr_columns.py`**
- Tests column splitting, three-column OCR, and compares with single-image OCR
- Usage: `python test_ocr_columns.py ocr_test.jpg`

### Test Results

The three-column OCR produces text in correct reading order (column 1 → 2 → 3), which is a massive improvement over the previous scrambled output. The remaining junk text (答题卡提示语, 页码, 乱码) and column-seam artifacts will be cleaned by clicking the "AI 智能整理" button.

{
  "plan": "# UI Layout and Streaming Display Optimization\n\n## Problem Analysis\n\n### Problem 1: Page too long, right-column buttons not compact\n\n**Root cause:** The right column ([app.py](app.py) lines 234-332) uses &#96;st.divider()&#96; between each section and lays out buttons in 2-column grids. Each category (commentary, prescription, microtask) has \"综合\" taking a full row, then 4 dimension buttons in a 2x2 grid = 3 rows per category. With dividers and section headers, this creates ~20+ vertical elements.\n\n**Fix:** Restructure each category to: \"综合\" on its own row (full width), then 4 dimension buttons in a single 4-column row. Remove excessive dividers. Add CSS to reduce button padding/margins. This cuts each category from ~4 rows to 2 rows.\n\nTarget layout per category:\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n[        综合        ]       &lt;-- 1 row, full width\n[立意][结构][论证][语言]     &lt;-- 1 row, 4 columns\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nAdditionally, constrain the overall page height with CSS so the three columns don't overflow the viewport, and increase the chat container height to fill available space.\n\n### Problem 2: AI cleanup shows ugly inline streaming dialog\n\n**Root cause:** &#96;_do_ai_cleanup()&#96; ([app.py](app.py) lines 95-118) creates a &#96;st.empty()&#96; placeholder and streams markdown chunks into it with a cursor character. This renders visibly in the left column during processing.\n\n**Fix:** Remove the visible streaming placeholder entirely. Just use &#96;st.spinner()&#96; with no visible text accumulation. Collect chunks silently in the background and only update &#96;essay_text&#96; when done.\n\n### Problem 3: Streaming JSON shown raw, then replaced by rendered result\n\n**Root cause:** &#96;_stream_and_save()&#96; ([app.py](app.py) lines 134-149) does two things sequentially:\n1. Streams raw LLM output into a &#96;st.empty()&#96; placeholder as markdown (shows raw JSON text with cursor)\n2. After streaming completes, clears the placeholder, parses JSON, and calls &#96;render_result()&#96;\n\nThe user sees ugly raw JSON scrolling during step 1, then it disappears and gets replaced by the nicely rendered version. This is jarring.\n\n**Fix approach -- incremental rendering:** Instead of showing raw JSON during streaming, show a spinner/progress message (\"AI 正在分析...\") during the streaming phase, then render the structured result once complete. This is the simplest reliable approach because:\n\n- **Why not parse JSON incrementally?** JSON is not parseable until the closing &#96;}&#96; arrives. Partial JSON like &#96;{\"score_summary\": \"总评...\", \"issues\": [{\"dimen&#96; cannot be parsed mid-stream. There are incremental JSON parsers (like &#96;ijson&#96;), but they add complexity and still can't render structured Pydantic models until complete sub-objects arrive.\n- **Why not show markdown preview of partial JSON?** Raw JSON rendered as markdown looks terrible (the current problem). Converting partial JSON to markdown in real-time would require custom parsing logic for each schema type and would be fragile.\n- **Recommended approach:** Replace the raw streaming preview with a clean \"thinking\" animation, then render the full structured result. This is what ChatGPT and similar tools do for structured outputs. The user experience is: click button -&gt; see \"AI 正在分析...\" with spinner -&gt; structured result appears.\n\nOptionally, we can add a subtle progress indicator showing elapsed time or a pulsing animation to reassure the user that work is happening.\n\n## Files to Modify\n\n### [app.py](app.py) -- Main changes\n\n**Right column button layout (lines 234-332):**\n- Remove dividers between sections, use &#96;st.markdown&#96; with smaller spacing\n- Change each category from 2-column to: 1 full-width \"综合\" + 4-column dimension row\n- Add compact CSS for buttons\n\n**AI cleanup (lines 95-118):**\n- Remove &#96;placeholder&#96; and visible streaming\n- Keep only &#96;st.spinner()&#96; wrapping the silent chunk collection\n\n**Streaming display (lines 134-149):**\n- Replace &#96;ph.markdown(\"\".join(collected) + \"▌\")&#96; with a spinner or \"thinking\" placeholder\n- Keep the final &#96;render_result()&#96; call unchanged\n\n**CSS section (lines 30-36):**\n- Add styles to reduce button padding, limit page height, and make columns fit viewport\n\n### [core/render.py](core/render.py) -- No changes needed\n\nThe render functions are already clean. The problem is purely in the streaming preview phase.\n\n## Detailed Changes\n\n### CSS additions (app.py top)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;python\nst.markdown(\"\"\"\n&lt;style&gt;\n    .block-container { padding-top: 1rem; padding-bottom: 0.5rem; }\n    .stChatMessage { font-size: 0.95rem; }\n    section[data-testid=\"stSidebar\"] { display: none; }\n    /* Compact buttons in right column */\n    .stButton &gt; button { padding-top: 0.25rem; padding-bottom: 0.25rem; font-size: 0.85rem; }\n&lt;/style&gt;\n\"\"\", unsafe_allow_html=True)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Right column new layout pattern (for each of commentary/prescription/microtask)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;python\nst.markdown(\"**作文点评**\")\nif st.button(\"综合点评\", key=\"btn_comm_all\", use_container_width=True):\n    _on_commentary(\"commentary_overall\", None, \"综合点评\")\nc1, c2, c3, c4 = st.columns(4)\nwith c1:\n    if st.button(\"立意\", key=\"btn_comm_ly\", use_container_width=True):\n        ...\nwith c2:\n    if st.button(\"结构\", key=\"btn_comm_jg\", use_container_width=True):\n        ...\nwith c3:\n    if st.button(\"论证\", key=\"btn_comm_lz\", use_container_width=True):\n        ...\nwith c4:\n    if st.button(\"语言\", key=\"btn_comm_yy\", use_container_width=True):\n        ...\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### AI cleanup -- silent background execution\n&#96;&#96;&#96;python\ndef _do_ai_cleanup() -&gt; None:\n    essay = ctx.get(\"essay_text\")\n    if not essay.strip():\n        st.warning(\"请先进行 OCR 识别或输入作文正文\")\n        return\n    from core.ocr.ai_cleanup import cleanup_ocr_stream\n    collected: list[str] = []\n    with st.spinner(\"AI 智能整理中…\"):\n        for chunk in cleanup_ocr_stream(essay):\n            collected.append(chunk)\n    cleaned = \"\".join(collected).strip()\n    if cleaned:\n        ctx.set_val(\"essay_text\", cleaned)\n        st.session_state[\"_ocr_just_ran\"] = True\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Streaming display -- spinner instead of raw JSON\n&#96;&#96;&#96;python\ndef _stream_and_save(action, dimension=None, user_input=None):\n    collected: list[str] = []\n    with st.spinner(\"AI 正在分析…\"):\n        for chunk in dispatch_action_stream(action, dimension=dimension, user_input=user_input):\n            collected.append(chunk)\n    full_text = \"\".join(collected)\n    parsed = parse_result(action, full_text)\n    render_result(parsed)\n    ctx.append_chat(ChatMessage(role=\"assistant\", content=full_text, action_type=action))\n    if hasattr(parsed, \"chat_summary\") and parsed.chat_summary:\n        ctx.set_val(\"chat_summary\", parsed.chat_summary)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n",

      "id": "focus_mode_impl",
      "prompt": "文档中要求的\"专注作答模式\"需要页面灰化 + 浮层对话框 + 倒计时。Streamlit 原生不支持 modal overlay 和 JavaScript 倒计时。实现方案有两种，你倾向哪种？",
      "options": [
        {
          "id": "st_dialog",
          "label": "方案A：使用 st.dialog 装饰器（Streamlit 1.35+ 内置弹窗），配合 st.empty 做倒计时轮询。弹窗内显示题目+输入框+提交按钮，倒计时通过 session_state 记录截止时间、页面定时 rerun 刷新。灰化效果通过 CSS 覆盖层模拟。"
        },
        {
          "id": "inline_mode",
          "label": "方案B：不用弹窗，直接在中栏内联显示\"专注作答区\"（题目+倒计时+输入框+提交按钮），同时通过 session_state 的 focus_mode 标志禁用左栏和右栏的所有按钮（disabled=True）。视觉上更简洁，兼容性更好。"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "timer_precision",
      "prompt": "倒计时的精度要求？Streamlit 没有原生实时计时器，需要通过 JavaScript 注入或定时 rerun 实现。",
      "options": [

          "id": "js_timer",

        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}

{
  "plan": "# 微任务训练升级 -- 选题、计时作答、AI评分\n\n## 整体流程\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nstateDiagram-v2\n    [*] --&gt; GenerateTasks: 右栏点击维度按钮\n    GenerateTasks --&gt; ShowSelection: LLM返回4道题\n    ShowSelection --&gt; FocusMode: 学生点击某题\n    FocusMode --&gt; Grading: 手动提交 / 超时\n    Grading --&gt; ShowResult: LLM返回评分\n    ShowResult --&gt; [*]\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 涉及文件及改动\n\n### 1. &#96;core/context.py&#96; -- 新增 session_state 字段\n\n在 &#96;_DEFAULTS&#96; 中新增微任务专注模式所需的状态字段：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;python\n_DEFAULTS: dict = {\n    # ... 现有字段 ...\n    \"microtask_pool\": None,        # dict | None: 最近生成的题目池\n    \"microtask_selection\": None,   # dict | None: 当前选中的题目\n    \"focus_mode\": False,           # bool: 是否处于专注作答模式\n    \"focus_deadline_ts\": None,     # float | None: 截止时间戳\n    \"focus_duration_sec\": 600,     # int: 默认10分钟\n    \"focus_submitted\": False,      # bool: 防重复提交\n    \"microtask_grade_result\": None, # dict | None: 最近评分结果\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 2. &#96;core/schemas.py&#96; -- 新增 MicrotaskGradeResult 模型\n\n在微任务部分新增评分结果的 Pydantic 模型：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;python\nclass MicrotaskGradeResult(_Parseable):\n    score: int = Field(default=0, description=\"10分制评分\")\n    comment: str = Field(default=\"\", description=\"一句话点评\")\n    strengths: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list, description=\"优点\")\n    issues: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list, description=\"不足\")\n    next_steps: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list, description=\"改进建议\")\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 3. &#96;prompts/microtask_grade.md&#96; -- 新建评分 prompt 模板\n\n模板接收变量：&#96;{title}&#96;, &#96;{word_requirement}&#96;, &#96;{dimension}&#96;, &#96;{task_text}&#96;, &#96;{answer_text}&#96;, &#96;{criteria}&#96;\n\n要求 LLM 输出严格 JSON，包含 score/comment/strengths/issues/next_steps 字段。\n\n### 4. &#96;core/prompts.py&#96; -- 注册新模板\n\n在 &#96;build_messages&#96; 的 &#96;template_map&#96; 中新增：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;python\n\"microtask_grade\": \"microtask_grade.md\",\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n同时扩展 &#96;build_messages&#96; 函数，当 &#96;action == \"microtask_grade\"&#96; 时，额外注入 &#96;task_text&#96; 和 &#96;answer_text&#96; 变量（从 &#96;context&#96; 参数传入）。\n\n### 5. &#96;core/actions.py&#96; -- 注册新 action\n\n在 &#96;ACTION_SCHEMA&#96; 中新增：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;python\n\"microtask_grade\": (MicrotaskGradeResult, True),\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 6. &#96;core/render.py&#96; -- 新增评分渲染函数\n\n新增 &#96;render_microtask_grade(r: MicrotaskGradeResult)&#96; 函数：\n- 顶部大号显示分数（如 &#96;st.metric(\"评分\", \"7/10\")&#96;）\n- 点评文字\n- 优点列表、不足列表、改进建议列表\n\n在 &#96;render_result&#96; 分发函数中新增对 &#96;MicrotaskGradeResult&#96; 的判断分支。\n\n同时修改现有 &#96;render_microtask&#96; 函数：在每个任务的 expander 内增加一个\"开始作答\"按钮（&#96;st.button&#96;），点击后将该题写入 &#96;microtask_selection&#96; 并进入 focus_mode。\n\n### 7. &#96;app.py&#96; -- 主要 UI 改动（核心）\n\n这是改动最大的文件，分三个部分：\n\n**7a. 微任务生成后保存题目池**\n\n修改 &#96;_stream_and_save&#96; 或在微任务按钮回调中，当 action 为 &#96;microtask_dim&#96; 时，将解析后的 &#96;MicrotaskResult&#96; 同时写入 &#96;st.session_state[\"microtask_pool\"]&#96;（包含 dimension 和 tasks 列表）。\n\n**7b. 中栏：专注作答区**\n\n在中栏 chat_container 之后、chat_input 之前，检查 &#96;focus_mode&#96;：\n- 如果 &#96;focus_mode == True&#96;：\n  - 显示选中题目的标题和说明\n  - 显示剩余时间（用 &#96;time.time()&#96; 与 &#96;focus_deadline_ts&#96; 比较，显示\"剩余约X分钟\"）\n  - 显示 &#96;st.text_area&#96; 供学生作答\n  - 显示\"提交答案\"按钮\n  - 检查是否超时：如果 &#96;time.time() &gt; focus_deadline_ts&#96;，自动提交\n  - 提交逻辑：调用 &#96;microtask_grade&#96; action，将结果追加到 chat_history，退出 focus_mode\n\n**7c. 左栏和右栏按钮禁用**\n\n当 &#96;focus_mode == True&#96; 时，所有按钮传入 &#96;disabled=True&#96;。通过在文件顶部读取 &#96;_locked = ctx.get(\"focus_mode\")&#96; 变量，然后在每个 &#96;st.button&#96; 调用中加入 &#96;disabled=_locked&#96;。\n\n### 8. 微任务题目选择交互\n\n在 &#96;render_microtask&#96; 中，每个任务 expander 内新增\"开始作答\"按钮。按钮的 key 使用 &#96;f\"btn_start_task_{i}\"&#96;。点击后：\n- 设置 &#96;microtask_selection = {\"index\": i, \"title\": task.title, \"instruction\": task.instruction, \"check_rule\": task.check_rule, \"dimension\": dimension}&#96;\n- 设置 &#96;focus_mode = True&#96;\n- 设置 &#96;focus_deadline_ts = time.time() + focus_duration_sec&#96;\n- 设置 &#96;focus_submitted = False&#96;\n- 调用 &#96;st.rerun()&#96;\n\n但这里有一个问题：&#96;render_microtask&#96; 在 &#96;core/render.py&#96; 中，它不知道当前的 dimension。解决方案是将\"开始作答\"按钮的逻辑放在 &#96;app.py&#96; 中，而不是 render.py 中。具体做法：\n- 在 &#96;app.py&#96; 的 chat history 渲染循环中，当检测到 &#96;action_type == \"microtask_dim\"&#96; 的消息时，在渲染结果之后额外渲染\"开始作答\"按钮。\n- 或者更简单：修改 &#96;render_microtask&#96; 接受一个可选的 &#96;on_select&#96; 回调参数。\n\n推荐方案：在 &#96;app.py&#96; 中处理，不修改 render.py 的 &#96;render_microtask&#96; 签名。在 chat history 渲染循环中，对 &#96;microtask_dim&#96; 类型的消息，解析后如果是 &#96;MicrotaskResult&#96;，则在每个 task 下方添加\"开始作答\"按钮。\n",
  "name": "Microtask Training Upgrade",
  "todos": [

Here's a summary of the changes I made to fix the JSON parsing issue:

### Problem Analysis

The error `Expecting ',' delimiter: line 1 column 31 (char 30)` indicates the LLM (MiniMax-M2.5) is sometimes producing malformed JSON for the `microtask_dim` action. This can happen when:

1. The model prepends thinking/preamble text before the JSON (e.g., "好的，我来设计微任务。\n\n{...}")
2. The model produces JSON with structural issues due to complex essay content in the prompt

### Fixes Applied

**`core/schemas.py`** -- Enhanced JSON parsing pipeline:

1. **Added `_extract_json_object()`** -- A bracket-matching function that finds the first complete `{ ... }` JSON object in text, correctly handling nested braces and string escaping. This handles the case where the LLM prepends non-JSON text before the actual JSON.

2. **Improved `parse_or_fallback()`** -- Now tries two parsing strategies in sequence:
   - First: direct `json.loads` on the cleaned text (fast path)
   - Second: extract the first JSON object via bracket matching, then parse (handles preamble)
   - Added `repr()` debug logging of the first 300 characters when parsing fails, so you can see exactly what the model returned

**`llm.py`** -- Added debug logging of the first streaming chunk to help diagnose future issues.

### Next Steps

Please restart the Streamlit app and try the microtask function again. If it still fails, the debug log will now show `原始文本前300字符:` with the exact raw output, which will reveal exactly what the model is producing. You can share that log line with me and I can make further targeted fixes.

Now I have the full picture. Let me explain the problem and implement a comprehensive solution.

---

**你的 JSON 解析不稳定有三个根本原因：**

1. **MiniMax Anthropic 接口没有原生 `json_mode`** — OpenAI 有 `response_format: json_object` 能在 token 采样层面强制输出合法 JSON，但 Anthropic 协议（MiniMax 走的是这个）没有这个参数。你现在只靠 system prompt 里的一句话来"请求"模型输出 JSON，这是不可靠的。

2. **当前容错管线太薄** — 只做了去 code fence + 提取 `{...}` 两步。对于 LLM 常见的 JSON 错误（尾部多余逗号、单引号、注释、控制字符、截断等）完全没有修复能力。

3. **没有自动重试机制** — JSON 解析失败后直接 fallback 到纯文本，用户看到的就是丑陋的 JSON 源码。应该先尝试修复，修复不了再自动重试一次 LLM 调用。

**解决方案：引入 `json-repair` 库 + 解析失败自动重试**

`json-repair` 是一个轻量库，专门修复 LLM 产出的各种畸形 JSON（尾逗号、单引号、缺引号、截断、注释等），成功率非常高。

---

Here's a summary of the complete solution:

### 问题根因

MiniMax 走 Anthropic 协议，**没有原生 `json_mode`**（不像 OpenAI 有 `response_format: json_object` 在 token 采样层强制 JSON）。你只靠 system prompt 里的一句话来请求 JSON 输出，模型经常会：
- 在 JSON 前加思考文字
- 输出尾部多余逗号
- 字符串内的换行/引号未正确转义
- JSON 被截断（max_tokens 不够）
- 用 markdown code fence 包裹

### 三层防御体系

**第一层：`json_repair` 自动修复**（`core/schemas.py`）

引入 [`json-repair`](https://pypi.org/project/json-repair/) 库，它能修复 LLM 常见的 JSON 错误：尾逗号、单引号、截断、未转义字符、前缀文字等。解析管线现在是：
1. 去 code fence → `json.loads` → 成功则返回
2. 提取 `{...}` 对象 → `json.loads` → 成功则返回
3. 对以上两个候选用 `json_repair` 修复 → 成功则返回
4. 全部失败 → 回退纯文本

**第二层：解析失败自动重试**（`llm.py`）

`call_llm_stream` 在 `json_mode=True` 时，流式输出结束后会检查完整文本是否是合法 JSON。如果不是，自动发起一次非流式重试调用，把错误输出作为上下文附上，要求模型自我修正。修正后的结果通过 `__JSON_RETRY__` 标记追加到流中。

**第三层：降低 temperature**（`core/actions.py`）

JSON 模式的调用 temperature 从 0.7 降到 0.4。更低的随机性 = 更规范的输出格式，显著减少 JSON 错误率。

### 修改的文件

| 文件 | 改动 |
|------|------|
| `requirements.txt` | 新增 `json-repair>=0.30.0` |
| `core/schemas.py` | 解析管线加入 `json_repair` 修复步骤 |
| `llm.py` | 流式调用加入 JSON 校验 + 自动重试机制 |
| `app.py` | 处理 `__JSON_RETRY__` 标记，使用修正后的文本 |
| `core/actions.py` | JSON 模式 temperature 降为 0.4 |

重启 Streamlit 后即可生效。

---

**当前微任务流程分析和问题诊断：**

你的日志暴露了关键线索：

```
Anthropic stream first chunk: '```json\n{\n  "tasks": [\n    {\n      "'
```

MiniMax 无视了 system prompt 中"不要用 code fence 包裹"的指令，依然输出了 `` ```json ... ``` ``。

**当前流程中存在三个串联故障点：**

1. **`_is_valid_json` (llm.py:183) 不去 code fence** — 收到 `` ```json\n{...}\n``` `` 后判定"不是合法 JSON"，触发了一次完全不必要的重试 (`_json_retry_call`)，白白浪费 20-30 秒
2. **重试的结果也可能带 code fence** — `_is_valid_json` 再次返回 False，`__JSON_RETRY__` 标记不会被 yield，所以最终 `_stream_and_save` 拿到的是原始带 code fence 的文本
3. **最关键的断裂点** — `_stream_and_save` 第 165 行：`isinstance(parsed, MicrotaskResult)` — 如果 `parse_or_fallback` 因任何原因返回字符串，`microtask_pool` 就不会被保存，"开始作答"按钮就永远不会出现。**整个微任务选题流程完全依赖 JSON 解析成功，没有任何降级路径。**

我现在做三个修复：

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="task" data-tool-name="todo_write">
<details><summary>Tool use: **todo_write** • Todo List</summary>

- [-] llm.py: Anthropic json_mode 使用 prefill 技巧强制 JSON 输出，避免 code fence
- [ ] llm.py: _is_valid_json 加入 code fence 清理，避免误触重试
- [ ] app.py: microtask_dim 解析失败时用 json_repair 兜底提取任务池

</details>
</tool-use>

---

**Fix 1: Anthropic prefill trick -- force the model to start with `{`**

This is the Anthropic-recommended approach for forcing JSON output. You add a partial assistant message with `{`, and the model is forced to continue from there, making it impossible to output code fences or preamble text.

I can see the issue now. The prefill trick works (no more code fences), but it creates a **double `{`** problem:

1. **Streaming**: My code yields `{` (the prefill), then the API returns `\n{\n  "tasks":...` (which itself starts with `{`). Result: `{` + `\n{\n  "tasks":...` = `{\n{\n  "tasks":...` — invalid JSON with double `{`.

2. **Non-streaming**: Same issue — `"{" + response` = `"{{..."` — double opening brace.

This tells us that MiniMax's Anthropic-compatible API **includes the prefilled `{` in its response** (unlike the real Anthropic API which excludes it). I need to detect and handle this.

---

**下面是完整的问题分析和修复总结：**

### 原来的微任务流程（有断裂）

```
点击"立意微任务" → LLM 流式返回 → 拼接文本 → parse_or_fallback()
                                                     │
                                        ┌─────────────┼───────────────┐
                                        ▼                             ▼
                                MicrotaskResult ✓               字符串 (fallback)
                                        │                             │
                              保存 microtask_pool              ❌ 什么都不做
                                        │                             │
                              页面重载时渲染                     ❌ 没有"开始作答"按钮
                              "开始作答"按钮                    ❌ 流程断裂
```

**核心问题：JSON 解析失败 = 整个微任务工作流崩溃**，没有任何降级路径。

### 三个具体 bug

| Bug | 根因 | 后果 |
|-----|------|------|
| MiniMax 总是输出 `` ```json ... ``` `` | Anthropic 协议没有原生 json_mode，只靠 prompt 请求 | code fence 包裹的 JSON 需要额外清理 |
| `_is_valid_json` 不去 code fence | 直接 `json.loads` 带 backtick 的文本 | 误判为"无效 JSON"，触发不必要的重试调用，白等 20-30 秒 |
| "开始作答"按钮完全依赖 `isinstance(parsed_msg, MicrotaskResult)` | 没有降级路径 | Pydantic 校验失败即断裂 |

### 修复内容

**1. Anthropic Prefill 技巧** (`llm.py`)

在 `json_mode=True` 时，向 messages 追加一条 `{"role": "assistant", "content": "{"}` 的预填充消息。这迫使模型从 `{` 开始继续生成，物理上不可能再输出 code fence 或前缀文字。同时自动检测 MiniMax 是否已在响应中包含了预填充的 `{`，避免重复。

**2. `_is_valid_json` 修复** (`llm.py`)

加入 code fence 去除逻辑，与 `schemas.py` 的解析管线保持一致，避免误触重试。

**3. 兜底任务池提取** (`app.py`)

```
parse_or_fallback() 返回字符串时:
  → _try_extract_microtask_pool() 用 json_repair 直接修复原始文本
  → 提取 tasks 数组存入 microtask_pool
  → 渲染"开始作答"按钮时优先用 MicrotaskResult，没有则从 pool 读取
  → 流程不再断裂
```

现在的流程：

```
LLM 返回 → prefill 保证以 { 开头 → json_repair 修复 → Pydantic 校验
                                                           │
                                              ┌─────────────┼────────────────┐
                                              ▼                              ▼
                                      MicrotaskResult ✓               字符串 (fallback)
                                              │                              │
                                    保存 microtask_pool          json_repair 兜底提取
                                              │                         保存 microtask_pool
                                              ▼                              ▼
                                      渲染"开始作答"按钮 ←───────── 从 pool 读取任务
```

重启 Streamlit 后即可测试。

_**User**_

你现在要在现有 Streamlit 作文评改应用中新增一个功能：右侧工具栏按钮【自评自查】。@doc/self_check_questions.md 

目标：
1) 点击【自评自查】后，在主区域渲染固定的 16 道选择题（A/B/C），题目与选项文本必须与 docs/self_check_questions.md 完全一致（不要改写）。
2) 学生完成 16 题并提交后，后端按“自动判读规则”计算四个维度（立意/结构/论证/语言）的 Raw、Norm、Ccount，并给出“最需改进维度”的最终判定。
3) 判定结果输出为 JSON（用于写入对话区历史消息），并且 JSON 里必须包含：
   - final_dimension: "立意"|"结构"|"论证"|"语言"
   - scores: 每个维度的 {raw, norm, ccount}
   - red_flags: {ideation_red: bool, pool: [维度...], triggered: [触发条款...]}
   - rationale: 只引用作答者选择，不评价原文；优先列出该维度所有选 C 的题号+关键词，再列出选 B 的题号+关键词（可选）；若触发红灯，明确说明触发条款

实现约束：
- 自评自查的判定必须是确定性规则计算（不要让大模型来“猜”维度）。
- 题库与规则来源：docs/self_check_questions.md（题目）与 docs/self_check_rules.md（规则）。如果这两个文件不存在，请创建并写入正确内容。
- Streamlit 侧：用 st.form + st.radio 渲染 16 题；提交时校验必须全部作答。
- 状态管理：将 answers 与 result 写入 st.session_state，且把 result 以一条“assistant 消息”追加到聊天记录中（与现有对话区呈现方式一致）。
- UI：点击按钮后，主区域顶部显示“自评自查（16题）”，下方显示表单；提交后展示 st.json(result) + 一段简短中文提示（<=80字），例如：“自评结果：最需改进维度=论证。原因见下方 JSON。”
- 提供一个“重新作答/清空”按钮：清除本次 answers/result。

需要新增/修改的代码结构建议（可按现有工程实际调整）：
- 新增：app/features/self_check.py
  - load_questions_from_md(path) -> questions（或直接常量 questions）
  - evaluate_self_check(answers_dict) -> result_json
  - render_self_check_ui()（Streamlit 表单渲染）
- 修改：现有右侧工具栏/路由逻辑，把【自评自查】接到 render_self_check_ui()

验收用例（必须通过）：
- 若 Q1=C 或 Q2=C：final_dimension 必须直接=立意（不比较其他维度）。
- 若未触发立意红灯，但红灯池非空：只在红灯池中选 Norm 最大者；Norm 并列看 Ccount；再并列按 论证>结构>语言。
- 若红灯池为空：在四维度中选 Norm 最大者；Norm 并列看 Ccount；再并列按 立意>论证>结构>语言。
- 若全 A：final_dimension 输出“论证”。

请先通读项目代码，定位：
- 右侧按钮是如何触发主区域渲染的
- 聊天历史 messages 的数据结构与追加方式
然后按上述要求实现，并在关键函数上写清楚注释（尤其是判定规则）。

Parameters:

```json
{
  "plan": "# Self-Check (自评自查) Feature Implementation\n\n## Architecture Overview\n\nThe current \"自评自查\" button (line 412 of &#96;streamlit_app.py&#96;) triggers &#96;_run_action(\"self_check\", ...)&#96;, which calls the LLM via &#96;dispatch_action_stream&#96;. The new design **replaces** this with a **deterministic, rule-based questionnaire flow** that never calls the LLM:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nflowchart TD\n    btnClick[\"Right column: click 自评自查\"] --&gt; setState[\"Set self_check_active=True in session_state\"]\n    setState --&gt; renderForm[\"Center column: render 16-question st.form\"]\n    renderForm --&gt; submit[\"Student submits all 16 answers\"]\n    submit --&gt; evaluate[\"evaluate_self_check(answers) -- pure rule calc\"]\n    evaluate --&gt; result[\"SelfCheckRuleResult JSON\"]\n    result --&gt; chatMsg[\"Append as assistant ChatMessage to chat_history\"]\n    result --&gt; renderUI[\"Display st.json + brief summary in center column\"]\n    renderUI --&gt; resetBtn[\"'重新作答' button: clear answers &amp; result\"]\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Key Design Decisions\n\n- The self_check action is **no longer routed through &#96;core/actions.py&#96; / LLM**. The button click sets a flag in &#96;session_state&#96;; the center column conditionally renders the form or the result.\n- The existing &#96;SelfCheckResult&#96; schema in &#96;core/schemas.py&#96; was designed for LLM output. We will **not reuse it** -- instead, the new &#96;core/self_check.py&#96; module will produce a plain &#96;dict&#96; (matching the required JSON structure), which gets serialized to JSON string and stored as &#96;ChatMessage.content&#96; with &#96;action_type=\"self_check_rule\"&#96;.\n- A new &#96;render_self_check_rule&#96; function in &#96;core/render.py&#96; will handle displaying this new result type.\n\n## Scoring Rules (from user spec)\n\nQuestions are grouped by dimension:\n- 立意: Q1-Q4\n- 结构: Q5-Q8\n- 论证: Q9-Q14\n- 语言: Q15-Q16\n\nScoring per answer: A=0, B=1, C=2\n\nPer-dimension scores:\n- &#96;raw&#96; = sum of answer scores for that dimension's questions\n- &#96;norm&#96; = &#96;raw / (2 * num_questions_in_dimension)&#96; (normalized to 0..1)\n- &#96;ccount&#96; = number of C answers in that dimension\n\nRed-flag rules:\n- &#96;ideation_red&#96; = True if Q1=C or Q2=C\n- &#96;pool&#96; = list of dimensions where &#96;ccount &gt;= 1&#96; (excluding 立意 if ideation_red is false for pool calc purposes -- actually pool is just dimensions with ccount&gt;=1)\n\nFinal dimension selection:\n1. If &#96;ideation_red&#96;: final = \"立意\" (unconditionally)\n2. Else if &#96;pool&#96; is non-empty: pick dimension in &#96;pool&#96; with max &#96;norm&#96;; tie-break by max &#96;ccount&#96;; further tie-break by priority order 论证 &gt; 结构 &gt; 语言\n3. Else (pool empty, no C answers at all): pick dimension with max &#96;norm&#96;; tie-break by max &#96;ccount&#96;; further tie-break by priority 立意 &gt; 论证 &gt; 结构 &gt; 语言\n4. All-A edge case: all raw=0, all norm=0, all ccount=0, pool empty -&gt; priority order gives \"立意\", but user spec says output \"论证\". So for the all-zero case, we hardcode \"论证\".\n\nRationale generation:\n- Lists all C-answer question numbers + keywords for the final dimension\n- Lists B-answer question numbers + keywords (optional)\n- If red flag triggered, states which trigger clause (Q1=C / Q2=C / both)\n\n## Files to Create / Modify\n\n### New: [&#96;core/self_check.py&#96;](core/self_check.py)\nContains:\n- &#96;QUESTIONS&#96;: list of 16 question dicts parsed from the markdown (hardcoded constant, verbatim text from &#96;doc/self_check_questions.md&#96;)\n- &#96;DIMENSION_QUESTIONS&#96;: mapping dimension -&gt; list of question indices\n- &#96;TIEBREAK_WITH_POOL&#96; / &#96;TIEBREAK_NO_POOL&#96;: priority ordering constants\n- &#96;evaluate_self_check(answers: dict[str, str]) -&gt; dict&#96;: pure function, deterministic rule calculation, returns the required JSON structure\n- &#96;build_rationale(answers, final_dim, red_flags) -&gt; str&#96;: builds the rationale string\n\n### New: [&#96;doc/self_check_rules.md&#96;](doc/self_check_rules.md)\nHuman-readable documentation of the scoring and decision rules (for reference; not loaded at runtime).\n\n### Modify: [&#96;streamlit_app.py&#96;](streamlit_app.py)\n- **Right column** (line ~412): Replace the current &#96;_run_action(\"self_check\", ...)&#96; call with setting &#96;st.session_state[\"self_check_active\"] = True&#96; and &#96;st.rerun()&#96;.\n- **Center column** (between chat container and focus mode): Add a conditional block: when &#96;self_check_active&#96; is True and no result yet, render the 16-question &#96;st.form&#96; with &#96;st.radio&#96; for each question. On submit, call &#96;evaluate_self_check&#96;, store result, append &#96;ChatMessage&#96;, and &#96;st.rerun()&#96;.\n- When &#96;self_check_result&#96; exists in session_state, display &#96;st.json(result)&#96; + brief summary text + \"重新作答\" button.\n- Add new session_state keys to &#96;_DEFAULTS&#96; indirectly (via &#96;ctx&#96;).\n\n### Modify: [&#96;core/context.py&#96;](core/context.py)\n- Add defaults: &#96;\"self_check_active\": False&#96;, &#96;\"self_check_answers\": None&#96;, &#96;\"self_check_result\": None&#96;\n\n### Modify: [&#96;core/render.py&#96;](core/render.py)\n- Add &#96;render_self_check_rule(result_dict)&#96; that shows a structured view: dimension scores table, red flag info, final dimension, and rationale.\n- Update &#96;render_result()&#96; dispatcher to handle &#96;action_type=\"self_check_rule\"&#96; by parsing the JSON content and calling &#96;render_self_check_rule&#96;.\n\n### Modify: [&#96;core/actions.py&#96;](core/actions.py)\n- Remove &#96;\"self_check\"&#96; from &#96;ACTION_SCHEMA&#96; and &#96;BUTTON_ACTIONS&#96; (it no longer goes through LLM).\n\n## Verification Cases\n\nThe &#96;evaluate_self_check&#96; function will be designed to pass these:\n1. Q1=C or Q2=C -&gt; &#96;final_dimension = \"立意\"&#96; (regardless of other answers)\n2. No ideation red, but pool non-empty -&gt; pick from pool by norm &gt; ccount &gt; priority(论证&gt;结构&gt;语言)\n3. Pool empty -&gt; pick by norm &gt; ccount &gt; priority(立意&gt;论证&gt;结构&gt;语言)\n4. All A -&gt; &#96;final_dimension = \"论证\"&#96; (all scores zero, tiebreak 立意&gt;论证&gt;结构&gt;语言 gives 立意... but user says \"论证\" -- will handle as special case)\n\n*Note on case 4*: The user's spec says all-A should yield \"论证\". Under the normal pool-empty tiebreak (立意&gt;论证&gt;结构&gt;语言), all-zero would give \"立意\". This means we need a **special-case**: if all raw scores are 0, return \"论证\" directly. I will implement this as specified.\n",

{
  "plan": "# Self-Check UI and Result Display Improvements\n\n## Problem 1: Questionnaire appears below the chat area, not inside it\n\n**Root cause:** The self-check form and result display are rendered at lines 386-439 of [&#96;streamlit_app.py&#96;](streamlit_app.py), which is *after* the &#96;chat_container&#96; (line 268) and the focus-mode block (line 310). They render in the center column but below the scrollable chat container, not inside it.\n\n**Fix:** Move the self-check form and result display into &#96;chat_container&#96; (the &#96;st.container(height=550)&#96; at line 268). Specifically, place them at the end of the chat history loop inside &#96;with chat_container:&#96;, so they appear as part of the conversation flow.\n\nNote: &#96;st.form&#96; works inside &#96;st.container&#96;, so this is safe.\n\n## Problem 2: Radio buttons default to \"A\"\n\n**Root cause:** Streamlit's &#96;st.radio&#96; always selects the first option by default. At line 413-420, the radio uses &#96;options=[\"A\", \"B\", \"C\"]&#96; with no way to set \"no selection\" natively.\n\n**Fix:** Add a sentinel placeholder option (e.g. &#96;\"-\"&#96;) as the first item in the radio options list, so nothing meaningful is selected by default. On form submit, validate that no answer is still &#96;\"-\"&#96; -- if any is, show a warning and block submission. The &#96;format_func&#96; will display this as &#96;\"-- 请选择 --\"&#96;.\n\n## Problem 3: Result display shows raw technical labels + rationale is mechanical\n\nThis has two sub-parts:\n\n### 3a: Remove &#96;raw=&#96;, &#96;norm=&#96;, &#96;ccount&#96; from UI\n\n**Root cause:** [&#96;render_self_check_rule&#96;](core/render.py) at line 156 directly shows &#96;raw={s['raw']}&#96; and &#96;norm={s['norm']:.2f}  C*{s['ccount']}&#96; as metric labels.\n\n**Fix:** Replace with Chinese labels. Show the dimension name as the metric label, the score as a fraction like \"4/8\" (raw/max), and use the delta to show the number of C answers in Chinese. Concretely:\n- Primary value: &#96;\"{raw}/{max}\"&#96; (e.g. \"4/8\")\n- Delta: &#96;\"C答题{ccount}道\"&#96; (or omit if ccount=0)\n\nThe max per dimension is: 立意=8, 结构=8, 论证=12, 语言=4 (i.e. &#96;2 * number_of_questions&#96;).\n\n### 3b: Generate natural-language rationale via LLM\n\n**Root cause:** &#96;_build_rationale&#96; in [&#96;core/self_check.py&#96;](core/self_check.py) produces a formulaic template like \"立意维度选C的题目：Q1（任务对齐）、Q2（论点清晰度）。立意维度得分: raw=4, norm=0.5, C题数=2。\"\n\n**Fix:** After &#96;evaluate_self_check&#96; computes the deterministic result (scores + final_dimension), make a single non-streaming LLM call to generate a natural, student-friendly rationale paragraph. The prompt will receive:\n- The final dimension\n- Each dimension's score summary (in Chinese)\n- Which questions got B or C answers with their keywords\n- Whether red flags were triggered\n\nThe LLM's job is purely *editorial*: explain the already-determined result in fluent Chinese. The final_dimension and scores remain deterministic; only the rationale text is LLM-generated.\n\nNew prompt file: [&#96;prompts/self_check_rationale.md&#96;](prompts/self_check_rationale.md)\n\nFlow change in [&#96;streamlit_app.py&#96;](streamlit_app.py):\n1. User submits form -&gt; &#96;evaluate_self_check(answers)&#96; -&gt; deterministic result\n2. Show spinner \"正在生成分析...\"\n3. Call &#96;call_llm(messages, json_mode=False)&#96; (non-streaming, plain text) to get a ~100-word Chinese rationale\n4. Replace &#96;result[\"rationale\"]&#96; with the LLM output\n5. Store result and append to chat history\n\n## Files to Modify\n\n- **[&#96;streamlit_app.py&#96;](streamlit_app.py):** Move self-check UI into &#96;chat_container&#96;; add &#96;\"-\"&#96; sentinel to radios with validation; call LLM for rationale after evaluation\n- **[&#96;core/render.py&#96;](core/render.py):** Update &#96;render_self_check_rule&#96; to show Chinese-friendly score labels instead of raw/norm/ccount\n- **[&#96;core/self_check.py&#96;](core/self_check.py):** Add &#96;DIMENSION_MAX&#96; constant (for display) and a &#96;build_llm_rationale_prompt(result, answers)&#96; helper that assembles the context for the LLM call\n- **New [&#96;prompts/self_check_rationale.md&#96;](prompts/self_check_rationale.md):** Short prompt template for generating the rationale\n",

All 6 tasks are complete. Here's a summary of what was changed:

**1. Self-check form moved into chat container** (`streamlit_app.py`)
- The 16-question form and result display were moved from a standalone block below the chat area into the `with chat_container:` block (after the chat history loop), so they now render inside the scrollable conversation area.

**2. Radio buttons no longer default to "A"** (`streamlit_app.py`)
- Added a `"-"` sentinel as the first radio option, displayed as "-- 请选择 --" via `format_func`.
- On submit, validation checks that no answer is still `"-"` and shows a warning listing unanswered questions if any remain.

**3. Chinese-friendly score display** (`core/render.py`)
- Replaced `raw=X` / `norm=X.XX C×N` metric labels with `"得分/满分"` format (e.g., "4/8") and Chinese delta text like "其中选C 2 题".
- Removed the "完整 JSON" expander for a cleaner result page.

**4. LLM-generated natural rationale** (3 files)
- **New file `prompts/self_check_rationale.md`**: Prompt template instructing the LLM to write a warm, student-friendly 80-120 character rationale based on the deterministic scores and student choices.
- **`core/self_check.py`**: Added `DIMENSION_MAX` constant and `build_llm_rationale_prompt()` which fills the template with scores, B/C answer details, and red flag notes.
- **`streamlit_app.py`**: After `evaluate_self_check()`, calls `call_llm()` (non-streaming, plain text) to generate the rationale under a "正在生成分析..." spinner. Falls back to the rule-based text if the LLM call fails.
